summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tilt AI decision layer app iteration 4. All 18 backend tests passed (100%) including 5 new tests for the POST /api/assist endpoint. Frontend landing page renders correctly with all required data-testid attributes. All three backend endpoints (/api/health, /api/assist, /api/generate-decisions, /api/analyze-screen) working correctly via Emergent LLM Key.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 OK with status and timestamp
POST /api/assist accepts basic message and returns {response, mode: 'chat'}
POST /api/assist uses screen_context in its response
POST /api/assist supports conversation continuation with previous messages
POST /api/assist works with all parameters (message, screen_context, conversation, mode, user_preference, tone_traits)
POST /api/assist returns 422 for missing message
POST /api/analyze-screen accepts base64 JPEG image and returns context/activity
POST /api/analyze-screen handles data URI prefix correctly
POST /api/analyze-screen returns 422 for missing image_base64
POST /api/generate-decisions works with basic input
POST /api/generate-decisions returns safe/smart/bold/reasoning JSON structure
POST /api/generate-decisions works with screen context
POST /api/generate-decisions works with user_preference and tone_traits
POST /api/generate-decisions works with all parameters combined
POST /api/generate-decisions returns 422 for missing input_text
Full integration flow: analyze screen -> generate decisions
Landing page renders with 'Decide better, together.' headline
'Start Decision Layer' button present and clickable
Tilt logo present
App root with data-testid='app-root' present
All data-testid attributes present in FloatingPalette (mode-chat-btn, mode-decide-btn, pip-screen-context, pip-decision-input, pip-submit-btn, pip-card-safe/smart/bold)
All data-testid attributes present in CommandPalette (decision-input, submit-decision-btn, close-palette-btn, screen-context-banner, insight-bar)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly including new /api/assist endpoint for conversational AI. Screen sharing flow cannot be fully automated due to browser permissions requirement. Document Picture-in-Picture API requires Chrome 116+ and user gesture. The /api/analyze-screen endpoint may 403 through external proxy for large payloads - use localhost:8001 for backend testing. The CommandPalette only opens when screen sharing is active (isSharing=true) and PiP is not supported.

assist_endpoint.description: New POST /api/assist endpoint for conversational AI (like Claude Cowork)

chat_interface.description: FloatingPalette and CommandPalette redesigned as chat interfaces with two modes (Assist/Decide)
